hHueGDP (redirected from UseCases.WatchHueGDP ) The GDP is no longer supported by the Accessors Framework. This page exists as a historical reference. This is a use case ? of accessors. See: Edward A. Lee, " Accidental Complexity ," Presented at th

A. Lee, " Accidental Complexity ," Presented at the TerraSwarm 2016 Annual Review . Scenario The user is wearing a Motorola Watch The user raises their hand and a Hue lightbulb goes on A message is sent to the GDP When the user lowers their hand, the

nt to the GDP When the user lowers their hand, the light goes off and a message is sent to the GDP The user creates a model in the Cape Code Host and tests it The user then deploys the model to the SwarmBox, where it starts up and uses the Node Host

armBox, where it starts up and uses the Node Host . The user turns off their laptop and the model continues to run Discussion The interesting thing about this demo is not the trivial thing it does, but that it uses two Composite Accessors and Deploym

t that it uses two Composite Accessors and Deployment . Security The accessor that is created is not run in a Sandbox The Cape Code Host uses ssh authentication to transfer the accessor to the SwarmBox. See Also Use Cases ? Watch Gesture Accessor Dem
